items.title: 'Miracle on Ice' coach's ring sells for $549,000
items.summary: A ring given to Herb Brooks, the coach of the 1980 United States "Miracle on Ice" Olympic men's hockey team, recently sold for $549K at Heritage Auctions.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Brendan Sorsby files suit to restore NCAA eligibility
items.summary: The legal battle over the eligibility of Brendan Sorsby has begun.
